title: Asana allows you to copy columns (like Managed columns) on Pro - Monday limits to Enterprise
excerpt: The pro version of Monday.com limits managed columns to 3 - which creates a HUGE administrative burden to reproduce columns with selections in each new board / edits to existing boards. Asana allows this in the Pro versi…

posts.author: jramieri (Jackie Ramieri )
posts.cookedHtml: The pro version of Monday.com limits managed columns to 3 - which creates a HUGE administrative burden to reproduce columns with selections in each new board / edits to existing boards. Asana allows this in the Pro version inherently. This is a HUGE competitive difference. Monday.com team → this should not be an enterprise feature. It’s basic. Please reconsider and push this out to the Pro version. Honestly, the lack of this feature is causing me to reconsider going back to Asana for our organization - that’s how much this adds to our administrative burden.
